race.comment: RUSTEMO (7) lifted strongly to score by half a length at the most recent appearance over 1300m at Hawkesbury at the second run this prep. Racing high on confidence of late and another win is on the cards. PUFF 'N' HARRY (4) scored two back at Ipswich but was below his best last time when sixth over 1350m at Doomben. Finds an easier assignment and can turn things around. TRAPEDO (10) loves this track and trip with two wins and a second from just four attempts and will be ready to peak now third run back. Top-three conveyance. ALIQUAM (14) gets in well at the weights with the claim and can make her presence felt.
